art_direction: Refined for bold creative agency aesthetic—high-contrast orange (#ff6b35) energy against clean white, masonry grid layouts with 12px rounded cards and elevated shadows (0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.10)), pill-shaped interactive elements (radius 9999px), and reinterpreted 'Genome' as atomic design system visualization (component library grid rather than biological tissue). Dense, high-fidelity UI with precise 1:1 pixel density compensation.

organs.atom_style_hint: viewBox='0 0 200 480', slim control dock with dark (#111) background, pill-shaped search input (9999px radius), orange (#ff6b35) active states, Plus Jakarta Sans for headers, high-fidelity iconography at 1:1 density

viewBox='0 0 700 480', masonry hero canvas with white cards (12px radius), soft shadow (0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.10)), multiverse visualization as asymmetric bento grid, orange primary actions, Inter body text
viewBox='0 0 240 480', settings panel with high-contrast borders, pill toggles, orange accent (#ff6b35) for arbitrage parameters, dark (#1a1a2e) secondary background sections
viewBox='0 0 1140 140', full-width status bar with near-black (#111111) background, monospace Inter for logs, orange progress indicators, 12px rounded top corners
viewBox='0 0 220 520', tool palette with file browser as masonry list items, 12px rounded cards, muted (#888) inactive states transitioning to orange (#ff6b35) on hover, clean white backgrounds

viewBox='0 0 680 520', dual-view canvas (Editor/Roadmap) with tabbed interface using pill buttons (9999px radius), high-density content at 1:1 scale, subtle grid lines (#eee), Plus Jakarta Sans for headers
viewBox='0 0 240 520', Majordome assistant as floating card aesthetic within panel, soft shadow, orange accent dots for notifications, Inter 600 for labels, generous 32px internal padding
viewBox='0 0 1140 140', terminal footer with dark (#111) command line area, orange (#ff6b35) cursor/prompt, monospace Inter 400, 12px top radius, high-contrast audit log text (#333 on #fafafa)
viewBox='0 0 180 480', narrow context panel with vertical timeline aesthetic, orange milestones (#ff6b35), Inter 11px uppercase labels (weight 600), muted (#888) historical text

viewBox='0 0 720 560', Atomic Design System visualization—NOT biological organs. Display as masonry grid of component cards (atoms, molecules, organisms) with 12px radius, orange (#ff6b35) selection borders, dark (#111) component previews, Plus Jakarta Sans category labels, 1:1 pixel density compensation for high-fidelity SVG components

viewBox='0 0 240 560', split pedagogy panel with dual-card layout (12px radius), alternating white and accent2 (#1a1a2e) backgrounds, orange (#ff6b35) active learning indicators, dense educational content

viewBox='0 0 600 100', floating contextual inspector card with elevated shadow (0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.15)), 12px radius, white background, orange (#ff6b35) action buttons (pill shape), centered over main canvas
viewBox='0 0 200 540', configuration sidebar with secure vault aesthetic, dark (#111) headers, orange (#ff6b35) encrypted indicators, pill-shaped environment toggles, high-contrast form fields

viewBox='0 0 680 540', split deployment canvas (Chat/Iframe) with resizable pane handles (orange #ff6b35), 12px rounded message bubbles, masonry layout for preview cards, Plus Jakarta Sans for deployment status headers

viewBox='0 0 260 540', Le Propulseur guide panel with rich help content, 32px internal gaps, white cards with soft shadow, orange (#ff6b35) CTA buttons (pill radius 9999px), Inter 400 body with 600 weight labels
